task:
Create a letterboxed 720p view of a desktop capture stand-in in OBS Studio. The final collection must contain exactly one scene named 'Framed' (no default 'Scene' left over).

The 'Framed' scene must contain an Image source named exactly 'Desktop' with file /home/user/Pictures/desktop_shot.png.

Apply two filters to 'Desktop' in this exact order, with these exact names, types, and settings:
1. 'Trim' — Crop/Pad with Left = 40, Right = 40, Top = 20, Bottom = 20
2. 'Resize' — Scaling/Aspect Ratio with resolution 1280x720

Persist the changes to the scene collection JSON.

verification.eval: int(result.get('settings', {}).get('left', 0)) == 40 and int(result.get('settings', {}).get('right', 0)) == 40 and int(result.get('settings', {}).get('top', 0)) == 20 and int(result.get('settings', {}).get('bottom', 0)) == 20
verification.description: Crop/Pad values left=40 right=40 top=20 bottom=20

verification.eval: [f.get('name') for f in result].index('Trim') < [f.get('name') for f in result].index('Resize')
